mapper.insert:
select pj_seq.nextval from dual
insert all into project(id, biz_no, prj_par_id, prj_root_id, prj_name, prj_desc, prj_identifier, prj_status_cd, prj_lft, prj_rgt, user_id) values(#{projectNo}, #{bizNo}, #{prjParId}, #{prjRootId}, #{prjName}, #{prjDesc}, #{prjIdentifier}, #{prjStatusCd}, #{prjLft}, #{prjRgt}, #{userId} ) into enabled_modules(ena_id,prj_id,ena_name_cd) values(en_mod_seq.nextval,#{projectNo},#{enaNameCd}) select * from dual
